message:
feat(types): add missingness utilities and nanops reductions

Adds Scalar methods (is_null, is_na, coalesce), missingness utilities
(isna, notna, fill_na, dropna, count_na), and null-skipping numeric
reductions (nansum, nanmean, nanmedian, nanvar, nanstd, nanmin, nanmax,
nancount). 23 new tests covering all functions.

Closes: bd-2gi.18

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
